# Archivist Documentation — Decentralized Durable Storage Network

> Technical documentation for Archivist, a decentralized durable storage network. Archivist uses erasure coding, zero-knowledge proofs, and automatic repair to provide sovereign, censorship-resistant storage. Built on the RAPID durability framework.

## Core Concepts
- [What is Archivist?](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/what-is-archivist): Overview of decentralized durable storage — the problem, approach, and RAPID framework
- [Architecture](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/architecture): Decentralized storage architecture — erasure coding, proof system, state machines, peer-to-peer networking
- [Whitepaper](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/whitepaper): Formal protocol specification — data durability proofs, repair mechanisms, economic model

## Setup Guides
- [Quick Start](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/quick-start): Install and run a decentralized storage node in minutes
- [Build Archivist](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/build): Build from source on Linux, macOS, or Windows
- [Run Archivist](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/run): Node configuration, marketplace setup, Docker deployment
- [Using Archivist](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/using): REST API usage — upload, store, and retrieve data

## Reference
- [API](https://docs.archivist.storage/developers/api): REST API reference
- [Tokenomics Litepaper](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/tokenomics-litepaper): Token economics (under revision)

## Networks
- [Devnet](https://docs.archivist.storage/networks/devnet): Development network for testing
- [Testnet](https://docs.archivist.storage/networks/testnet): Public test network — join with your node

## Related
- [Main Site](https://archivist.storage): Product overview and team
- [Blog](https://blog.archivist.storage): Technical insights on decentralized storage
- [Manifesto](https://manifesto.archivist.storage): The Sovereign Storage Manifesto
- [GitHub](https://github.com/durability-labs): Source code
